STIPULATION TO ALLOW THE CASE TO BE HEARD BY A JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY NG, STEPHANIE CHIN, JOHN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-12-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-12-2022 BY PRO TEM DAVID FLEISIG. PLAINTIFF STEPHANIE NG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOHN CHIN IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-12-2022 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NG, STEPHANIE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CHIN, JOHN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,000.00 FILED BY NG, STEPHANIE AS TO DEFENDANT CHIN, JOHN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-12-2022 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
